projectSlug.description: Stable project identifier, for example shadow-clock-case.

storyBible.description: Approved Story Bible or compressed foundation handoff text.

chapterGoal.description: Chapter objective, required scenes, and reader promise.

priorContext.description: Prior chapter facts, character state, timeline, foreshadowing, and user feedback.

mode.description: lean or full. lean keeps the workflow concise; full asks for deeper revision notes.

chapter_prepare.description: Director prepares the chapter context package from the approved Story Bible and prior state.

chapter_blueprint.prompt:
你是 Novel-Creative-Architect。基于导演上下文包生成本章蓝图和场景卡，不写正文，不写入项目文件或 llmwiki。

上下文包：${chapter_prepare.output.handoff}

要求：给出章节目标、场景列表、每场冲突、信息反转、情绪曲线、结尾钩子、必须出现信息、禁用事项和潜在豆包 Creative Assist 使用建议。若建议使用豆包 CLI，只写用途和候选方向，不实际调用外部工具。

输出必须只包含 JSON，字段：preview(string)、handoff(string, 给正文草稿节点的完整章纲文本)、data(object, 包含 chapter_id/title/objective/scenes/emotion_curve/must_include/forbidden/doubao_assist_plan)、open_questions(array)、risks(array)、wiki_refs(array)、change_declarations(array)。
chapter_blueprint.description: Creative Architect turns context into a writable chapter blueprint.

chapter_draft.description: Creative Architect drafts the chapter while keeping all output in workflow memory.

continuity_review.description: Validator independently reviews the draft before revision or approval.

chapter_revision.description: Creative Architect revises after validation without bypassing P0/P1 blockers.

director_approval_package.description: Director packages the approved chapter candidate after human review.

archive_plan.description: Director converts the approved chapter package into a safe archive/wiki sync plan.
